name: Dispatcharr
longDescription:
Dispatcharr is a modern IPTV and live TV management platform that allows you to organize, manage, and stream IPTV sources through a simple web interface. It supports M3U playlists, EPG integration, channel management, transcoding capabilities, and hardware acceleration for supported devices.

Dispatcharr provides an all-in-one solution for managing live television streams and IPTV services while offering an easy-to-use web interface for administration and playback.
description: Modern IPTV and live TV management platform with M3U, EPG, and streaming support.
